Waypoint.name: wpgarden
Waypoint.label: TheGarden
Waypoint.Question: Are you at peace. Cindy?
Waypoint.Statement: Then rest here, little squirrel. Peace will come.

Waypoint.name: wpmountain
Waypoint.label: Mountain
Waypoint.Statement: Here I look out over te sea and wonder if he will return from the dark underworld to meet our child.

Waypoint.name: wppool
Waypoint.label: Pool
Waypoint.Statement: Let me drwown my worries and wash them away. Let me be at peace.

Waypoint.name: wptemple
Waypoint.label: Temp;e
Waypoint.Question: Have you come to honor the Mother Goddess?
Waypoint.Response: I have come to pray for the father of my daughter.
Waypoint.Statement: It iw well that you pray for his safe return from the underworld.

Waypoint.name: wptraining
Waypoint.label: Archery
Waypoint.Statement: Archery lets me forget my worries.
Concentrate, Salida. But your worries will not diminish. Your soul is troubeld. Go to the pool and bathe.
